reviews.feedback: This is so much better. I absolutely love it. The only feedback I have is I want to be able to add that configuration about excluding certain repositories or certain types of repositories. What would you say is the best way to do that? For example, in my case, I don't want any repositories that I own that are mine.

The only thing that this did better is it did a better job of identifying things to do in relation to what my actual intent is with this, with the issues. For example, for the Google M speed tool, it said to consider pinging the maintainer. What I think we should do is add a new thing to the GitHub tracker, which is success criteria or goal or intent with the issue, to help the AI agent better identify what the goal of this is. For some issues it's like, "Okay, I want my change implemented," and then some of them may be something
